steps.title: Locate Tikal Temple IV in the table
steps.content: The table lists four pyramids with their ages. Find the row for “The Tikal Temple IV” and read the rightmost column, which gives the age in years before present.

steps.title: Read the exact age and match to the choices
steps.content:
The table states Tikal Temple IV is 1,300 years before present—that is, 1,300 years ago.

The other three choices (1,900 to 2,300; 4,500 to 4,600; 3,800 to 4,000) are the ages of the other three pyramids in the table, not Tikal Temple IV.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
